retry_reason: If pci_get_slot fails (master not found), the function prints an error and continues; retrying would only be meaningful if the device appears later, but the function itself does not indicate failure to the caller.

judge.reason: The primary purpose is to inherit BIOS and primary channel flags from the master PCI function; the pci_get_slot/pci_dev_put calls are internal housekeeping for safe access, not the main logic. No reference-counted object is passed to the caller.
judge.retry_reason: If pci_get_slot fails (master not found), the function prints an error and continues; retrying would only be meaningful if the device appears later, but the function itself does not indicate failure to the caller.
